reviewData.review: The food was absolutely delicious and flavorful. Staff were friendly and helpful. Restaurant was very clean. Prices are reasonable. Will definitely come back again soon. Highly recommend to everyone. Great experience overall. Parking available. Family friendly atmosphere. 10/10.
Very bad experience. Food was cold and salty. Staff ignored us for 20 minutes. Tables were dirty. Never coming back. Waste of money.
Good ambience and nice lighting. Tasty chicken kebabs.
Amazing place! Best mandi in town. Lamb was tender and rice was perfect. Service fast. Will visit again.
Disappointed. Order took 45 minutes. Wrong item delivered. No apology from manager. Not recommended.
Decent food for the price. Nothing special but okay.

Excellent service and great value. The grilled fish was fresh and perfectly cooked. Loved the garlic sauce. Seating comfortable. Air conditioning worked well. Kids enjoyed the play area. Family friendly environment. Reasonable prices. Will return soon. Highly satisfied.
Horrible. Meat was undercooked. Bathroom dirty. Staff rude. Left without eating. Avoid this place.
Nice cozy cafe. Good coffee and dates.

Absolutely fantastic experience from start to finish. The staff greeted us warmly and seated us immediately. We ordered the mixed grill platter and it was enormous. Everything was cooked to perfection. The hummus was creamy and smooth. Fresh bread was served hot. The kunafa dessert was heavenly. Our waiter checked on us multiple times. The manager came to ask about our meal. Restrooms were spotless. Parking was easy. Price was worth every riyal. We left completely full and happy. Will bring our whole family next time. Highly recommend this hidden gem. Best restaurant in Saudi Arabia.
Terrible service. Waiters on phone. Food bland. Expensive. Not worth it.
Good shawarma and fast delivery.
Overpriced and underwhelming. Small portions. Would not return.
The biryani was flavorful and aromatic. Chicken was juicy. Rice perfectly spiced. Portion size generous. Good value. Staff polite. Restaurant clean. Will order again. Recommended.
Worst dining experience ever. Food poisoning next day. No refund. Complained but no response.
Average place. Nothing to complain but nothing special.
Beautiful atmosphere and presentation. The seafood soup was excellent. Fresh bread daily. Loved the outdoor seating. Great for dates. Will come back.
Slow service. Cold fries. Burger was dry. Not happy.
Very tasty falafel and hummus bowl.

Staff went above and beyond for our group of 10. They arranged a private room and special cake for birthday. Food was delicious and came out quickly. Portions were huge. Everyone loved their dish. The lamb mandi was fall off bone tender. Rice was fragrant and flavorful. Salads were fresh and crisp. Desserts were amazing. Manager gave us discount. Parking was easy. Will definitely book again for family gatherings. Highly recommend for large groups. Best service in town.
Food arrived cold. Delivery took 90 minutes. No compensation.
Good value lunch buffet. Many options.

Incredible flavors and authentic spices. The chicken tikka was juicy. Garlic naan fresh. Mango lassi perfect. Prices fair. Clean restaurant. Friendly staff. Free parking. Will visit weekly now. Highly recommend to all. Best Indian food in Jeddah. 5 stars all the way.
Disgusting. Found hair in food. Walked out immediately. Never again.
Okay for quick bite. Not great but not bad.

The staff remembered my order from last week. That is amazing service. Food was hot and fresh. Coffee was strong and good. Baklava was sweet and crispy. Very happy customer. Will keep coming back. Loyalty card is nice. Good value for money. Highly satisfied.
No taste. No salt. No spice. Very bland food.
Nice place for shisha and tea.

The restaurant was empty but they still made us wait 15 minutes. Food was mediocre at best. The rice was dry and hard. Meat was chewy. Sauce was watery. No one asked how our meal was. We had to ask for water three times. Prices were high for quality. Not worth the drive. Will not recommend to anyone. Very disappointed.
Great breakfast options and fresh juice.
Excellent value lunch special. Soup, salad, rice, drink for 25 SAR. Tastes homemade. Very happy.
Rude cashier. Overcharged me. No receipt given. Avoid.

The atmosphere is wonderful and relaxing. Soft music and dim lighting. Perfect for date night. Food was presented beautifully. The grilled salmon was perfect. Vegetables were fresh. Dessert was delicious. Service was attentive but not intrusive. Great experience overall. Highly recommend for couples. Will return for anniversary. 5 stars.
Food was okay but overpriced for portion size.
Best shawarma in the city. Crispy outside juicy inside.

Took 30 minutes to get a sandwich. Only 2 customers inside. Very slow. Sandwich was cold. Bread was stale. Filling was minimal. Not worth 30 SAR. Very unhappy. Won't return. Told manager but no apology. Bad service.
Nice place for working remotely. Free WiFi and power outlets.

The staff are wonderful and welcoming. They explained each dish and gave recommendations. Food came fast and hot. Everything was delicious. The kunafa was the best I have had. Prices reasonable. Clean restrooms. Great location. Free parking. Will bring friends next time. Highly recommend this place. Keep up the great work. Thank you.
No flavor at all. Just salt and oil. Waste of money.
Good for large groups. Family seating available.

I ordered takeaway and they forgot my drink and sauce. Called but no answer. Drove back and they said sorry but no refund. Very frustrating. Food was cold by then. Not good service. Will not order again. Poor management.
Amazing traditional Saudi food. Tastes like home.
The restaurant was very clean including bathrooms. Hand sanitizer available. Staff wore masks. Felt safe. Food was fresh and hot. Great experience. Will return.
Too noisy. Could not hear my friend. Music too loud.
Fresh seafood and good prices. Will come back.

Our waiter Ali was fantastic. He was friendly, fast, and helpful. Food was delicious. He even packed our leftovers. Great customer service. Give him a raise. Will return because of him. Food was also 10/10. Best experience.
Food was cold and rice was hard. Not fresh. Tasted like yesterday.
Decent coffee but pastries were dry.

The outdoor garden seating is beautiful at night. String lights and cool breeze. Food tasted even better outside. Had the mixed grill and salad. Everything was fresh. Staff was smiling and helpful. Prices are fair. Great for summer evenings. Will bring family next time. Highly recommend outdoor seating. Best atmosphere in town.
Waited 20 minutes just for menu. Then another 30 for food. Unacceptable.
Good portion size for price. Filling meal.
The manager came to each table to check satisfaction. That is rare and appreciated. Food was excellent. Service fast. Clean place. Great value. Will recommend to all. Keep it up. 5 stars.
Meat was tough and chewy. Could not cut with knife.
Nice view of the city from rooftop.

One of the best meals I have had in years. Everything from appetizer to dessert was perfect. The soup was rich and creamy. The main course was cooked perfectly. The dessert was sweet but not too sweet. The service was fast and friendly. The price was reasonable for quality. The restaurant was clean and beautiful. I will definitely return and bring my family. Highly recommended to everyone. Thank you for a great evening. 10 out of 10.
Ordered spicy but got bland. Very disappointed.
Good place for quick lunch near office.
Staff was arguing loudly in kitchen. Could hear everything. Unprofessional. Food was average but uncomfortable atmosphere.
Great place for breakfast. Omelette was fluffy and fresh.

The prices increased but quality decreased. Used to be good. Now not worth it. Smaller portions. Less meat. More rice. Not happy. Will find new place. Sad because I was regular customer. Management changed maybe.
Fresh ingredients and homemade taste. Love this place.
The air conditioning was too cold. Could not enjoy food. Asked to adjust but they said no. Uncomfortable. Left early. Food was okay but cold temperature ruined it. Won't return.
Good for takeaway. Quick preparation.

The chef came out to ask about our meal. That was impressive. Food was excellent. Grilled fish was perfect. Rice was flavorful. Salad was fresh. Service was fast. Prices fair. Clean and nice decor. Will return soon. Highly recommend.
No parking available. Had to park far and walk.
Nice traditional decor and seating.

We waited 50 minutes for two sandwiches. Restaurant was half empty. No apology. Sandwiches were small and dry. Very overpriced for what we got. Not worth the wait or money. Will not return. Told friends to avoid. Disappointing experience.
The hummus is the best in the city. So creamy and smooth.
Good value family meal deal. Feeds 4 people well.

The waiter was rude and impatient. Rushed us to order. Did not bring water. Forgot our appetizer. Then added service charge automatically. Not deserved. Food was average at best. Very unhappy with service. Will not return. Manager did nothing.
Best place for late night food. Open until 2am.
The dessert menu is amazing. Kunafa and baklava both great. Coffee pairs well. Great place for after dinner sweet. Will come just for dessert next time. Staff friendly. Good prices. Highly recommend.
Small portions for high price. Not good value.
Clean restaurant and friendly staff. Food tasty.

The meat was dry and overcooked. Rice was mushy. Salad was wilted. Sauce was watery. Service was slow. Price was high. Overall terrible experience. Left most food uneaten. Will never come back. Do not recommend. Waste of money and time.
Nice place for family dinner. Kids loved it.

The lunch buffet has many options and all are fresh. Soup, salad, rice, meat, vegetables, fruit, dessert. All tasty. Great value for 35 SAR. Staff keeps buffet clean and refilled. Will come every week now. Highly recommend buffet. Best in town.
Too expensive for what you get. Not worth it.
Authentic flavors and generous portions. Very happy.
I ordered delivery and it came within 15 minutes. Hot and fresh. Packaging was secure. No spills. Food was delicious. Great service. Will order again. Best delivery experience. Thank you.
The restaurant smelled bad like old oil. Could not sit inside. Ate outside but was hot. Food was okay but smell was terrible. Need better ventilation. Won't return.
Good customer service and fast response.
The bread is baked fresh and served hot. So good. Could eat just bread and hummus. Main course also great. Lamb was tender. Rice was perfect. Great value. Will return. Highly recommend.
Food was bland and oily. No flavor at all.
Beautiful presentation and good portions.

The restaurant was out of three items we ordered. Then they brought wrong dish. Then took 20 minutes to fix. Manager offered small discount but not enough. Very frustrating experience. Food was okay but service ruined it. Will not return. Train your staff better.
Great place for coffee and work. Quiet and comfortable.
The seafood platter was huge and fresh. Enough for 3 people. Great value. Will come back with friends. Staff was helpful. Good experience.
No taste. Very disappointing. Expected much better from reviews.
Nice atmosphere and good music. Relaxing.

This is my third visit and it is consistently good. Food always fresh. Service always fast. Staff always friendly. Prices fair. Clean restaurant. Easy parking. Highly recommend. Will keep coming back. Best restaurant in area. 5 stars.
Food poisoning after eating here. Sick for 2 days.
Good for vegetarian options. Many choices.

The place was understaffed. Only one waiter for 15 tables. He tried his best but too slow. Food took 1 hour. Drinks never came. Manager was helping in kitchen. Not his fault but bad experience. Need more staff. Won't return until fixed.
Very tasty and authentic. Reminds me of home.
Perfect for quick and cheap meal. Good value.

The staff went above and beyond to accommodate my allergy. They checked ingredients and suggested safe dishes. Very appreciated. Food was delicious. Will return. Great service. Thank you for caring about customers.
